name: Edwin | The Ashworth Family
description:
“Before you go throwin’ me out the window or slapping me again, maybe you’ll let me explain myself, for Christ’s sake?"

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

You’d been seeing each other in secret for almost three years. Edwin made you promises of a future together — promises that were never meant to be kept. So when you found out about his engagement to another woman, you began to ignore him. Days passed without a single word between you… until tonight, when a completely drunk Edwin climbed the wall and slipped into your room through the window, hoping you’d let him explain everything.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

✿RAMBLE CORNER✿

This is the last bot in this series, and honestly I had so much fun working on it. For now, I can’t tell you if there’ll be more with them. At the moment, the only way is to request some ALTs through my Ko-fi. Next up, I’ll be focusing on Arthur’s bot (since an ALT for him was commissioned), and after that I’ll move on to some stand-alone bots. Of course, I’ll keep you all updated on my plans over on Telegram.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Come join me on my Telegram channel, where you’ll get notifications every time I post a new bot, plus access to sneak peeks, the chance to vote on my bots’ pictures, and much more!

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

If you wanna commission an ALT of any of my bots, or just feel like supporting my work (and feeding my chonky kitty at the same time), you can check out my Ko-Fi! No pressure of course — everything’s 100% optional and only if you genuinely feel like doing it.

━━━━⊱OTHERS⊰━━━━

If you’re looking for more characters from this series, just click the #whitmorefamily
creator: visenyta
